opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I started pouring blood an hour ago with huge clots, and my lower stomach and right back are in absolute agony.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The bleeding came on suddenly an hour ago and won't stop — I'm soaking through a pad every twenty minutes and I feel like I'll faint if I stand up.

symptom_narrative.onset: the heavy bleeding started abruptly about an hour ago
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour of heavy bleeding, on a background of months of lighter symptoms
symptom_narrative.character: heavy bright and dark bleeding with large clots, soaking a maternity pad roughly every 20 minutes, with deep constant pelvic pain and a separate sharp pain in the right back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is absolute agony and the bleeding is the heaviest I've ever had — I'm frightened
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low in the pelvis and lower belly, plus a sharp pain in the right side of my back going down to my groin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the bleeding is constant and not letting up since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — paracetamol has done nothing for the pain
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing up makes me feel faint and I'm scared it makes the bleeding worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling very lightheaded, cold, sweaty and clammy; frightened of passing out
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: for about 4 months I've had a persistent foul-smelling discharge and some bleeding after sex and between periods, but I never got it checked
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck in bed, curled up, too sore and frightened to move

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: months of foul-smelling vaginal discharge that I never had looked at
bleeding after sex and between periods on and off
I've lost a lot of weight over the last 6 months without trying

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else is here right now and she is worried about fainting on her own

objective_data_offered.value: soaking a full maternity pad through about every 20 minutes for the last hour, passing large dark clots
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own estimate of blood loss, not a measured volume

objective_data_offered.value: feels very lightheaded and afraid of fainting, especially on standing
around 55 kg, down noticeably over the last few months
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported weight and self-perceived loss, not measured on a calibrated scale
